---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

## [Welcome]{style="color: #2C5282; font-size: 32px;"}

Hi, I'm **Mark Yee** — welcome to my course portfolio for **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications**.

This site consist of my journey through then course, updated regularly as I progress through the semester. Head to the [About](about.html) page to learn more about the course.

## [Latest Updates]{style="color: #2C5282; font-size: 28px;"}

::::: {style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; border-left: 4px solid #2C5282; padding: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 5px;"}
::: {style="flex: 0 0 200px;"}
![](images/clipboard-618185879.png){width="244"}
:::

::: {style="flex: 1;"}
### [Hands-on Exercise 1]{style="color: #366092;"}

**A Layered Grammar of Graphics: ggplot2 methods**

Explored the essential components of ggplot2 through the layered grammar of graphics framework — covering data, aesthetics, geometries, facets, statistics, coordinates, and themes.

[Read more →](HO_EX01.html)
:::
:::::

## [All Work]{style="color: #2C5282; font-size: 28px;"}

:::::: grid
::: g-col-4
### [Hands-on Exercises]{style="color: #366092;"}

Weekly practical exercises applying visual analytics techniques in R.

[View all →](hands-on/index.html)
:::

::: g-col-4
### [In-class Exercises]{style="color: #366092;"}

Short exercises completed during lessons to reinforce key concepts.

[View all →](in-class/index.html)
:::

::: g-col-4
### [Take-home Assignments]{style="color: #366092;"}

Independent projects applying visual analytics to real-world datasets.

[View all →](take-home/index.html)
:::
::::::
